item.title: DFI Co., Ltd.: One Step K in vitro diagnostic test REF: 81A4 Recall
item.product: One Step K in vitro diagnostic test REF: 81A4
item.summary: The devices were distributed without required FDA premarket clearance or approval. Product details: One Step K in vitro diagnostic test REF: 81A4
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution in the states of FL, PA and the country of England.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
